3178630.name: Mini Game：click
3178630.description:
This is a delightful entertainment game!

You need to observe the position of the flashing graphics in order to click on more graphics

Every time you click on a graphic, the score in the upper left corner will increase. Click on as many graphics as possible to get a higher score

The entire game screen is rich and colorful, full of vitality, and the background music is vivid and dynamic, adding more fun to your gaming experience! Get ready to face the challenge and become the fastest consumer entertainment player
3178630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
